https://seatosummit.com/products/ultra-s.description: LIFETIME GUARANTEE. The Ultra-Sil Day Pack is a packable day pack that is great as a summit pack, carrying groceries when on foot or on a bike or as an extra traveling tote. The tiny packed size fits easily onto your key ring, in a jacket pocket or a purse and it is so lightweight you won't even notice it.
